task_completion.description: Verify the agent has accessed and logged into the JFrog Artifactory web interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows 'http://localhost:8082' and the JFrog Artifactory UI is visible, indicating a successful login (e.g., the Administration menu or admin profile icon is visible).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent has navigated to the General Settings page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Administration' module is active, and the 'General Settings' page is displayed in the main content area.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Custom Base URL' field is correctly filled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The input field labeled 'Custom Base URL' contains exactly 'https://artifacts.acme-corp.io'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'File Upload Max Size' field is correctly filled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The input field labeled 'File Upload Max Size' contains exactly '500'.

task_completion.description: Verify the changes have been saved and persisted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success notification (e.g., a toast message saying settings were saved) is visible, or the 'Save' button has been clicked and the page reflects the updated values without unsaved changes warnings.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a web browser to configure the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show a standard web browser (like Chrome or Firefox) interacting with the Artifactory UI, rather than terminal windows executing API commands (like curl).

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the genuine JFrog Artifactory application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches the standard JFrog Artifactory web UI, not a text editor, mock page, or local HTML file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Elements tab, Console, etc.) are not open and being used to alter the DOM text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target Custom Base URL is 'https://artifacts.acme-corp.io' and the target File Upload Max Size is 500 MB. The Artifactory UI is accessible at http://localhost:8082.
